onClick: {{storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', true); storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', 'Generating captain mailout bundle...'); GenerateOnly.run(() => { SyncMailoutData.run(() => { const count = Array.isArray(SyncMailoutData.data && SyncMailoutData.data.jobs) ? SyncMailoutData.data.body.jobs.length : 0); storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', (GenerateOnly.data && GenerateOnly.data.message) || (GenerateOnly.data && GenerateOnly.data.body && GenerateOnly.data.body.message) || `Generated ${count} captain mailout job(s).`); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert('Captain mailout bundle generated', 'success'); }, (error) => { const message = `Generated bundle, but refresh failed: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); }); }, (error) => { const message = `Error: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); });}}
